heading: Exclusive remedy
label: 30904 Exclusive remedy
text: If a remedy is provided by this chapter, it shall be exclusive of any other action arising out of the same subject matter against the officer, employee, or agent of the United States or the federally-owned corporation whose act or omission gave rise to the claim.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090446 App.:745 (1st proviso).(1st proviso), ; , ; , .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 541 Stat. 526June 30, 1932, ch. 31547 Stat. 420Dec. 13, 1950, ch. 113664 Stat. 1112The words “officer, employee, or agent of the United States or the federally-owned corporation” are substituted for “agent or employee of the United States or of any incorporated or unincorporated agency thereof” for consistency in this chapter and to eliminate unnecessary words.
